logicalScenes.description: A macro rain of golden panko, wrinkled capers and chopped roasted pistachios hits a glossy orecchiette shell beside a white burrata cream edge.
logicalScenes.note: Texture-first opening; not a neutral ingredient lineup and not a final slicing beat.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry crunch against wet cream and lemon butter gloss
logicalScenes.sfxCue: crisp crumb rain on saucy pasta

notes: Lock orecchiette shell shape, not spaghetti.

logicalScenes.description: The camera pulls only slightly to clarify the crunchy topping is landing on lemon-butter orecchiette with torn burrata.
logicalScenes.note: Scene 2 pays off scene 1 immediately by identifying pasta, burrata and topping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: yellow butter sheen, white burrata streak, green pistachio chips
logicalScenes.sfxCue: soft pasta squish under crunchy garnish

notes: Final dish state can be teased, but no destructive action here.

logicalScenes.description: A spoon drags one sauced orecchiette through burrata cream, leaving a glossy lemon-butter trail.
logicalScenes.note: Food-porn motion stays simple: one spoon drag, no lift that changes final geometry.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thick cream streak and translucent butter film

logicalScenes.description: A quick overhead context shot shows the shallow hero bowl on the light terrazzo island before cutting back to topping prep.
logicalScenes.note: Brief context only; prepares the origin story for the crunchy topping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: finished bowl glows with yellow, white and green contrast
logicalScenes.sfxCue: quiet room tone with tiny garnish crackle

logicalScenes.description: Cut back to a final close-up of pistachio crumbs sticking to burrata cream and lemon zest threads.
logicalScenes.note: Texture payoff before process begins.
logicalScenes.textureCue: coarse crumb, cream, citrus zest

logicalScenes.description: Raw green pistachios tumble into a hot dry pan in a single stream.
logicalScenes.note: Supplemental creator step starts clearly.
logicalScenes.textureCue: matte green nuts hitting dark pan

notes: Do not render pistachios as herbs.

logicalScenes.description: Pistachios jump and deepen at the edges as the pan shakes once.
logicalScenes.note: One clear pan-shake motion, no floating nuts.
logicalScenes.textureCue: toasted brown edges, oily green interiors

logicalScenes.description: A chef knife chops the roasted pistachios into irregular coarse chunks on a cutting board.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock: pieces are 2-5 mm, not green powder.
logicalScenes.textureCue: hard nut crack, chunky emerald shards

notes: Visible hand or stable knife; no floating blade.

logicalScenes.description: Breadcrumbs, capers, thyme, parmesan, chili flakes and pistachio chunks scrape together into a golden topping.
logicalScenes.note: Readable topping quantity: a generous mound, not a dusting.
logicalScenes.textureCue: gold crumb sand with caper pops and pistachio shards

logicalScenes.description: The finished crunchy topping slides into a shallow dish, ready to rain over burrata later.
logicalScenes.note: This topping remains visible again in segment 6.
logicalScenes.textureCue: coarse golden-green crunchy pile

logicalScenes.description: The induction zone and large pot establish the pasta-cooking setup in the Licorn kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: Context shot before detail boil.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam over black induction plate

logicalScenes.description: Orecchiette pours into boiling salted water, each small ear-shaped shell visible.
logicalScenes.note: Hard shape lock: orecchiette only, not spaghetti, penne or shells larger than 3 cm.
logicalScenes.textureCue: small concave shells, bubbling starch

notes: Recipe source used spaghetti; creator override must dominate.

logicalScenes.description: A measuring cup catches cloudy pasta water before draining.
logicalScenes.note: Reserved water is necessary for emulsion causality.
logicalScenes.textureCue: cloudy starchy liquid

logicalScenes.description: Drained orecchiette steams in a colander-like moment, still firm and cup-shaped.
logicalScenes.note: Transition context from boiling to sauce work; al dente surface remains glossy but not mushy.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam, firm ridged cups

logicalScenes.description: Diced butter drops into the hot pan and begins to foam.
logicalScenes.note: Brief sauce setup context before the amber macro transformation.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pale butter cubes melting into foamy fat

logicalScenes.description: Foam collapses and the butter turns glossy amber with tiny browned speckles.
logicalScenes.note: Color target: amber, not pale and not black.
logicalScenes.textureCue: nutty brown butter speckles

logicalScenes.description: Minced garlic scatters into amber butter and blooms without burning.
logicalScenes.note: One-minute garlic cue.
logicalScenes.textureCue: small pale garlic bits in amber fat

logicalScenes.description: Lemon juice hits the pan with a visible hiss, followed by bright zest threads.
logicalScenes.note: Citrus payoff after brown butter.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam, yellow zest curls, glossy sauce

logicalScenes.description: A spoon draws through the finished lemon butter, showing a thin glossy amber trail.
logicalScenes.note: Sauce state reference for later toss.
logicalScenes.textureCue: fluid amber emulsion base

logicalScenes.description: Cloudy pasta water pours into the lemon butter and turns it from clear fat into a silky emulsion.
logicalScenes.note: Causal emulsion moment.
logicalScenes.textureCue: cloudy swirl becoming glossy sauce

logicalScenes.description: Orecchiette drops into the pan and catches lemon butter inside the cups.
logicalScenes.note: Orecchiette shape remains 2-3 cm, not spaghetti or penne.
logicalScenes.textureCue: shell cups filling with glossy sauce

logicalScenes.description: Tongs toss the pasta in one high glossy fold, showing steam and elastic motion.
logicalScenes.note: Single main toss, visible utensil.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steamy yellow gloss

logicalScenes.description: A close shell reveals sauce pooling inside the orecchiette cup with a fleck of lemon zest.
logicalScenes.note: Texture payoff every 3-5 scenes.
logicalScenes.textureCue: butter emulsion pooled in pasta cup

logicalScenes.description: The sauced orecchiette slides into a warm shallow bowl in a thick glossy mound.
logicalScenes.note: Context bridge from induction toss to island plating sequence.
logicalScenes.textureCue: saucy mound, steam, lemon zest flecks

logicalScenes.description: A whole burrata ball lands gently onto the hot orecchiette mound.
logicalScenes.note: One burrata ball, about palm-sized, not miniature pearls.
logicalScenes.textureCue: taut white mozzarella skin against glossy yellow pasta

logicalScenes.description: A spoon splits the burrata skin and thick stracciatella cream begins to spill into the orecchiette.
logicalScenes.note: Main destructive food-porn beat; keep it before the final pre-outro segment.
logicalScenes.textureCue: torn mozzarella skin, thick white cream ribbon

logicalScenes.description: Basil leaves tear and fall in a small vivid green scatter over the cream.
logicalScenes.note: Quantified garnish: several visible leaves, not one tiny fleck.
logicalScenes.textureCue: fresh torn basil against white cream

logicalScenes.description: The crispy caper-pistachio topping pours in a thick shower onto the open burrata.
logicalScenes.note: Visible quantity: two spoonfuls across the top, not a sparse dust.
logicalScenes.textureCue: gold-green crunch landing on white cream

logicalScenes.description: Extra lemon zest and parmesan snow over the crunchy burrata center.
logicalScenes.note: Final bright garnish before hero resolution.
logicalScenes.textureCue: yellow zest threads, fine parmesan, coarse pistachio crumb
logicalScenes.sfxCue: zest rasp and fine cheese fall

logicalScenes.description: Black pepper cracks over the creamy center and dark specks stick to burrata.
logicalScenes.note: Last destructive/action garnish before final still hero segment.
logicalScenes.textureCue: black pepper specks on white cream

logicalScenes.description: The completed bowl sits intact and motionless on the light terrazzo island in the Licorn kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: Required pre-outro final state: no touching, no drip, no spoon dive.
logicalScenes.textureCue: motionless final state with torn burrata, glossy pasta and crunchy topping

notes: This final geometry must match FinalDishVisual.

logicalScenes.description: Macro pass over the torn burrata crater already filled with pistachio-caper crunch.
logicalScenes.note: Camera motion only; dish state does not change.
logicalScenes.textureCue: cream crater, green pistachio, golden crumbs

logicalScenes.description: Macro pass over orecchiette cups holding lemon butter beside basil and lemon zest.
logicalScenes.note: Orecchiette shell identity remains clear.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sauce in pasta cups, basil green, zest yellow

logicalScenes.description: The Licorn character appears behind the island, visibly satisfied while the bowl stays untouched in the foreground.
logicalScenes.note: Character supports the final satisfaction beat and does not interact with the dish.
logicalScenes.textureCue: foreground creamy pasta, background character smile
logicalScenes.sfxCue: tiny happy kitchen ambience, no speech

logicalScenes.description: The closing frame settles on the exact FinalDishVisual state: torn burrata, glossy orecchiette, crunch, basil, zest and pepper, intact and motionless.
logicalScenes.note: This is the source state for the standardized outro; no food-porn action here.
logicalScenes.textureCue: stable finished dish with creamy-crunchy contrast

notes: Must resolve to FinalDishVisual for outro continuity.

logicalScenes.description: Standardized Licorn celebration outro uses the app override prompt with the final dish intact in the foreground.
logicalScenes.note: Agent declares metadata only; app injects the canonical outro prompt.
logicalScenes.textureCue: unchanged final dish identity beside celebration motion

notes: No custom outro prompt in agent artifact.
